mapper.sql: id, goods_id, sku_code, color, color_image, size, price, stock, image_url, bar_code, is_default, deleted, add_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM clothing_goods_sku WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM clothing_goods_sku WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM clothing_goods_sku WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND color = #{color} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM clothing_goods_sku WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND color = #{color} AND size = #{size} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clothing_goods_sku (goods_id, sku_code, color, color_image, size, price, stock, image_url, bar_code, is_default, deleted, add_time, update_time) VALUES (#{goodsId}, #{skuCode}, #{color}, #{colorImage}, #{size}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{imageUrl}, #{barCode}, #{isDefault}, 0, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO clothing_goods_sku
goods_id, sku_code, color, color_image, size, price, stock, image_url, bar_code, is_default, deleted, add_time, update_time,
#{goodsId}, #{skuCode}, #{color}, #{colorImage}, #{size}, #{price}, #{stock}, ELSE 0, #{imageUrl}, #{barCode}, #{isDefault}, 0, NOW(), NOW(),
mapper.update: UPDATE clothing_goods_sku SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE clothing_goods_sku SET deleted = 1 WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId}
